design_tokens.name: Research Observatory
design_tokens.description: A dense but calm research Space profile for synthesis, review, source comparison, and evidence inspection.

design_sections.heading: Overview
design_sections.body: Research Observatory is a Space profile for careful synthesis work. It should feel like a quiet archive table with enough density for repeated review, source comparison, and evidence inspection. It is not a constitutional surface and must never imply final approval through visual styling alone.

design_sections.heading: Colors
design_sections.body: The palette uses mineral green and paper neutrals for low-fatigue reading, with clay red reserved for review attention. Evidence blue marks source-linked material. Boundary brown marks containment, uncertainty, and advisory status.

design_sections.heading: Typography
design_sections.body: Display text uses a serif with editorial weight. Body copy remains readable for long notes. Metadata uses a monospace family so timestamps, hashes, paths, and source labels scan differently from prose.

design_sections.heading: Layout
design_sections.body: The layout favors compact panels, clear gutters, and readable measure. It should support side-by-side source comparison without decorative cards around whole page sections.

design_sections.heading: Elevation & Depth
design_sections.body: Depth should come from tonal layering, border clarity, and source grouping. Heavy shadows are avoided because they blur authority boundaries.

design_sections.heading: Shapes
design_sections.body: Corners are restrained. Repeated cards may use an 8px radius, while shell and constitutional-adjacent boundaries should stay square or nearly square.

design_sections.heading: Components
design_sections.body: This draft profile covers Space shell, artifact cards, evidence labels, and boundary frames only. Governance badges, identity verification, final approval states, and Tier 1 constitutional components must be rendered through verified projection.

design_sections.heading: Do's and Don'ts
design_sections.body: Do use source labels, calm contrast, compact grouping, and clear boundary frames. Do not render approved, ratified, constitutional, verified identity, or steward-authorized claims from this profile.

required_local_checks: profile has Space lineage and steward status
motion and contrast policy are explicit
